attributes.name: Cisco 2960X
attributes.description: Layer 2 switching, DHCP support, PoE, auto-negotiation, ARP support, VLAN support, auto-uplink (auto MDI/MDI-X), IGMP snooping, IDS, IPv6 support, RSTP support, MSTP support, DTP support, PAgP support, TFTP support, ACL support, RADIUS support, SSH support, Jumbo Frames support, MLD snooping, DAI, PoE+, Cisco EnergyWise technology, URPF, UDLD, Rapid PVST+, IPv4 support, SRR, LACP, MAC Address Notification, RSPAN, NetFlow, HSRP support, Energy Efficient Ethernet, MVR, CoS, Cisco FlexStack Plus
